title: 3 Beaten-Down Stocks to Buy Before Earnings and Hold Forever

title: Builders FirstSource Plans New $1B Stock Buyback
text: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) Board authorized a repurchase of $1 billion of its common shares. Under the completed share repurchase programs authorized in August and November of 2021, a total of 30.6 million shares were repurchased at an aggregate cost of $2 billion or an average price of $65.43 per share.

title: 7 Best Stocks to Buy During an Interest-Rate Driven Market Crash

title: 7 Safe Stocks to Rely On When the Market Swerves
text: When markets that have flown so high for so long start to tumble, along with an economy that transitioning, safe stocks are essential. The post 7 Safe Stocks to Rely On When the Market Swerves appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Macro Tailwinds Point To Attractive Returns For Builders FirstSource
text: The aftermath of the financial crisis in 2008 led to significant under building of single-family homes in the last decade. BLDR, as the largest supplier of home building materials in the US, is poised to benefit from the coming house building boom.
